pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin version to a newer snapshot release.
Replace separate source and target configuration with the unified release flag for Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' options are deprecated in favor of 'release' for modern Java toolchains; using 'release' ensures consistent compilation and runtime behavior for Java 21.

Replace String.format with String.formatted for MySQL JDBC URL construction.
Replace String.format with String.formatted for PostgreSQL JDBC URL construction.

src/main/java/h2/orm/core/MetadataManage.after:
if (idValue instanceof Number number) {

src/main/java/h2/orm/example/SpringBootS.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() introduced in Java 21.

src/main/java/h2/orm/exception/Exception.general_idea: Refactor instanceof check to use pattern matching for cleaner code.

if (throwable instanceof ConstraintViolationException exception) {

src/main/java/h2/orm/service/BackupServi.general_idea: Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for Java 21 compatibility.
src/main/java/h2/orm/service/BackupServi.why_exists: Paths.get() is deprecated for removal in Java 21; using it may cause compile-time deprecation warnings or errors depending on compiler settings, and Path.of() is the preferred modern API.

src/main/java/h2/orm/service/BackupServi.general_idea: Update imports to use specific classes instead of wildcard for java.nio.file.

src/main/java/h2/orm/service/ExportServi.general_idea: Replace legacy List.get(0) with List.getFirst() to utilize Java 21 API.
src/main/java/h2/orm/service/ExportServi.why_exists: List.getFirst() is a new API introduced in Java 21; while get(0) still compiles, the intent is to adopt the new standard library method.

src/main/java/h2/orm/service/ExportServi.general_idea: Replace instanceof check with pattern matching to eliminate explicit casting.
src/main/java/h2/orm/service/ExportServi.why_exists: Pattern matching for instanceof was introduced in Java 16; this change modernizes the code but is not strictly required for Java 21 compilation if the old syntax was used.

src/main/java/h2/orm/service/ExportServi.general_idea: Replace instanceof check with pattern matching for Boolean type.
src/main/java/h2/orm/service/ExportServi.why_exists: Pattern matching for instanceof was introduced in Java 16; this change modernizes the code but is not strictly required for Java 21 compilation if the old syntax was used.

src/main/java/h2/orm/service/ExportServi.after: else if (value instanceof Boolean boolean1) { cell.setCellValue(boolean1); }
